allow: PowerShell($zip = "$env:TEMP\\kenney_racing.zip"; $out = "$env:TEMP\\kenney_racing"; if \(Test-Path $out\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $out }; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $out -Force; Get-ChildItem -Recurse $out -Directory | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($out = "$env:TEMP\\kenney_racing"; Write-Output "=== CARS ==="; Get-ChildItem "$out\\PNG\\Cars" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "=== OBJECTS ==="; Get-ChildItem "$out\\PNG\\Objects" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "=== ASPHALT TILES ==="; Get-ChildItem "$out\\PNG\\Tiles\\Asphalt road" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell($out = "$env:TEMP\\kenney_racing"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; function dim\($p\){ $i=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($p\); "$\([System.IO.Path]::GetFileName\($p\)\): $\($i.Width\)x$\($i.Height\)"; $i.Dispose\(\) }; dim "$out\\PNG\\Cars\\car_red_1.png"; dim "$out\\PNG\\Cars\\car_blue_1.png"; dim "$out\\PNG\\Tiles\\Grass\\land_grass04.png" 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "$out\\PNG\\Tiles\\Grass" | Select-Object -First 8 -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "--- objects sizes ---"; dim "$out\\PNG\\Objects\\cone_straight.png"; dim "$out\\PNG\\Objects\\barrel_red.png"; dim "$out\\PNG\\Objects\\oil.png"; dim "$out\\PNG\\Objects\\tree_small.png")
